name: claude-md
description: Generate/refresh a project's agent rules via a hybrid model — a tailored preamble plus an idempotent managed block (Karpathy working discipline, verification, adaptive parallel-git workflow with worktree-first isolation, self-learning rules). Canonical-file aware: writes to CLAUDE.md, or AGENTS.md when the repo is multi-tool (Codex). Ships with /learn to append a rule whenever the agent makes a mistake. Re-runnable; never touches content outside its managed block.
